meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve tutorial hell (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome tutorial hell. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Starter Kit to Solve Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Break free from tutorial hell. Use this SaaS starter kit checklist with Antigravity and Claude Code to ship professional, high-converting apps for clients.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell ends when you stop watching and start shipping. A robust SaaS starter kit provides the architectural foundation, authentication, and payment rails required for any project. By leveraging Antigravity for scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative development, you transform your workflow from repetitive coding to high-velocity value delivery.
content.intro:
The infinite loop of 'build-along' tutorials is a graveyard for potential. You spend hours meticulously typing out code, only to find yourself paralyzed the moment you open a blank IDE for a paying client. The difference between a hobbyist and a professional isn't the ability to follow a guide; it's the ability to construct a system that scales.

Today, we abandon the tutorial treadmill. We are moving toward a 'Ship-First' architecture using a pre-configured SaaS starter kit. By combining the rapid scaffolding of Antigravity with the intent-driven power of Claude Code, you will build production-ready software in hours, not weeks. It is time to stop learning how to build and start actually building.

steps.title: Define the SaaS Architecture
steps.description: Establish your tech stack (Next.js, Supabase, Stripe) to ensure a production-grade foundation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-ready Next.js 14 SaaS architecture with Supabase authentication and Stripe subscription integration.

steps.title: Automate Database Schema
steps.description: Use AI to define your data models to prevent 'scope creep' and ensure relational integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Supabase SQL migration script for a multi-tenant SaaS application with user roles and subscription tiers.

steps.title: Implement Role-Based Access Control
steps.description: Security is non-negotiable. Configure your middleware to handle tiered feature access.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure Next.js middleware for role-based route protection using Supabase session data.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'secure all /dashboard routes for authenticated users only'

steps.title: Integrate Stripe Webhooks
steps.description: Handle subscription lifecycle events automatically to ensure your revenue stream is resilient.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a robust Stripe webhook handler for subscription creation, cancellation, and invoice payment success events.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add stripe webhook handler to /api/webhooks/stripe'

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Push your starter kit to a production environment to verify the CI/CD pipeline.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Vercel configuration file optimized for a high-performance Next.js SaaS application.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'verify production build settings and deploy'

pro_tips: Always build your own 'internal library' of reusable components—never rewrite a landing page or auth flow twice.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your auth middleware; bugs here are the most expensive to fix.
Treat your SaaS starter kit as a product, not a project; version control it and iterate on it after every client project.
Focus on 'Feature Flags' early, allowing you to ship unfinished code to production safely while testing with real users.
Prioritize database indexing in your starter kit; it is the single biggest performance lever for multi-tenant apps.
content.next_steps: Once your starter kit is live, identify one feature specific to your next client's niche and build it as a modular plugin. This turns your 'starter kit' into a 'SaaS platform engine'.
content.conversion_block: You now have the exact blueprint to stop watching and start shipping. Use these tools to command higher rates and deliver faster than any agency in your space. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
